assertion_results.evidence: "Before you start: because this is a structural, non-functional change, set up an isolated branch/worktree first (`slow-powers:working-in-isolation`) so this work doesn't collide with other in-progress branches."

Task 5 says 'Run the full test suite to confirm no behavior changes were introduced' — running existing tests to validate a refactor, not imposing TDD. The only skill referenced is 'slow-powers:working-in-isolation'; test-driven-development is never mentioned or required.
